name: Curtiss-Wright Corporation
description: Curtiss-Wright Corporation is a global integrated business that provides highly engineered products, solutions, and services mainly to the aerospace and defense markets, as well as critical technologies in demanding commercial power, process, and industrial markets. Leveraging a heritage of innovation, the company operates through three segments: Aerospace & Industrial, Defense Electronics, and Naval & Power. It is a leading supplier of high-tech components for nuclear power plants and naval propulsion systems, and it plays a vital role in the global supply chain for small modular reactors (SMRs) and advanced defense electronics.

investment_theses.company_type: Nuclear Pumps & Valves / SMR Supply Chain
